query_name:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM (
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          c_last_name,
          c_first_name,
          d_date
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_value/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_value/date_dim/*.parquet') AS date_dim, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/customer/*.parquet') AS customer
        WHERE
          store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
          AND store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
          AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200 + 11
    )
    EXCEPT
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          c_last_name,
          c_first_name,
          d_date
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/catalog_sales/*.parquet') AS catalog_sales, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_value/date_dim/*.parquet') AS date_dim, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/customer/*.parquet') AS customer
        WHERE
          catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
          AND catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
          AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200 + 11
    )
    EXCEPT
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          c_last_name,
          c_first_name,
          d_date
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/web_sales/*.parquet') AS web_sales, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_value/date_dim/*.parquet') AS date_dim, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/customer/*.parquet') AS customer
        WHERE
          web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
          AND web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
          AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200 + 11
    )
) AS cool_cust
